stream_samples.text: notion AI just hallucinated an entire meeting that never happened, with names and times. concerning.
Q&A is making up sources from our enterprise wiki — citing pages that don't exist. how is this in prod?
Mobile editor lags 2-3 seconds per keystroke on long pages. iPad Pro M4. unusable for real work.
[#7740 P2] permission inheritance broken — child page restricted, parent grants admin, child still inherits
Two of my teammates edited the same database row, one set silently won. no conflict warning, no history entry.
notion AI quoted a salary figure for someone that's just... wrong. confidently wrong. need a citation toggle.
Sync conflicts on shared databases are biting us hard since the realtime backend rolled out. lost edits.
Q&A grounded-on-workspace toggle isn't sticking — defaults back to general LLM after every session
Mobile app freezes for 8-10s when opening pages with >50 inline databases
notion calendar's AI scheduling actually picked a slot that didn't conflict with my deep-work block. impressed.
Notion API: page property updates silently dropped when a rate-limit retry hits during a transaction
anyone else's Notion calendar showing duplicate events for cross-timezone meetings? rolled out to my workspace yesterday
We need an audit log for AI usage on enterprise pages — legal is asking and we have nothing to show
[ai-grounding] retrieval index lags page edits by ~6min, AI answers go stale immediately after publish

clusters.title: AI Q&A hallucinations on enterprise workspaces
Mobile editor lag on long pages
Calendar duplicate events on TZ-cross meetings

top_epic.title: Ground Notion AI in workspace truth, with citations
top_epic.rationale: 1,840 signals across X, Reddit and Zendesk converge on the same complaint: Notion AI is fabricating content on enterprise pages and citing pages that don't exist. The retrieval index also lags edits by ~6 minutes, which is why answers go stale right after publish. This is the #1 churn risk surfaced by Enterprise CSMs this quarter.
top_epic.verdict: Trust-critical — enterprise won't expand seats while AI is unreliable.
top_epic.recommendation: Force grounded-on-workspace by default for enterprise plans, surface inline citations, and tighten the retrieval index SLA.
acceptance_criteria: Default Q&A to workspace-grounded for enterprise plans
Inline citations linking to source page + block anchor
Retrieval index lag < 60s p95 after page publish
Refuse-to-answer when no grounding is available, with explainer

evidence.quote: Notion AI just hallucinated an entire meeting that never happened, with names and times.
Q&A is making up sources from our enterprise wiki — citing pages that don't exist.
Retrieval index lags page edits by ~6min, AI answers go stale immediately after publish.

confluence.title: PRD · Grounded AI for enterprise workspaces
